title: Fedora
writer: Camillo Mastrocinque, Pier Luigi Melani, Cesare Morgante
actors: Luisa Ferida, Amedeo Nazzari, Osvaldo Valenti
plot: This first Italian-made feature film released in the United States following WWII relates the story of Russian Princess Fedora (Louise Ferida), in Czarist times, whose royal lover is assassinated on the eve of their marriage. She ...
